an2.210-214:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, possessing two qualities, one is deposited in hell as if brought there. What two? (210) Anger and hostility … (211) Denigrationand insolence … (212) Envy and miserliness … (213) Deceitfulness and craftiness … (214) Moral shamelessness and moral recklessness. Possessing these two qualities, one is deposited in hell as if brought there."
